sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70771" key="nhssi/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νησσίον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">νῆσσα,</foreign> <sense id="n70771.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">PLond.ined.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0060.tlg001.perseus-grc3:2181" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2181</biblScope> </bibl> <date TEIform="date">(vi/vii A.D.)</date>.</sense> </entryFree>
